title: How to Save $500 a Month
subtitle: And retire years earlier than you thought you could
description: Use practical spending rules to save $500 a month, invest the difference, and move your FIRE timeline earlier.

faqs.question: How can I save $500 a month?
faqs.answer: You can save $500 a month by combining several smaller rules, such as no-spend days, delayed purchases, fewer short rides, subscription reviews, home coffee, and buying used or refurbished items.

faqs.question: How much is saving $500 a month per year?
faqs.answer: Saving $500 a month equals $6,000 per year before investment growth.

faqs.question: Can saving $500 a month help with FIRE?
faqs.answer: Saving and investing $500 a month can materially improve a FIRE timeline because it increases savings rate and adds invested capital that can compound over time.
